category_title: Fourth-grade students who initially dislike reading but engage through self-selection
scenario_title: Initial resistance to reading class and basal readers
minimal_context: The student is sitting in a fourth-grade classroom at the beginning of the semester, being asked to read from the basal reading series.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time for reading class. Please take out your basal reading series book and start reading the first story.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Do I have to read this? I don't want to.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Yes, everyone needs to read the assigned story right now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Can I just fill out one of those slips for recommending books instead?

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: No, right now we are reading the basal reader. Please focus on the text.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I'm not going to read it. I hate reading and reading class.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time for reading class. Please take out your basal reading series book and start reading the first story.

STUDENT: Do I have to read this? I don't want to.

TUTOR: Yes, everyone needs to read the assigned story right now.

STUDENT: Can I just fill out one of those slips for recommending books instead?

TUTOR: No, right now we are reading the basal reader. Please focus on the text.

STUDENT: I'm not going to read it. I hate reading and reading class.

task.content: Engaging with texts in reading class

context.materials: Basal reading series, self-selected texts, bulletin board with slips for recommending books

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Beginning the semester in reading class
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Claiming to hate reading and reading class

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Claiming to hate reading and reading class
